title: Clean off-schedule comparison for Phase1b K128
goal: Find a HopperHop recipe that can plausibly reach 5/5 G1
hypothesis: Current evidence points to early Glass helping representation and late Glass hurting gait refinement; compare off-at-1M, off-at-2M, and always-on under clean tags.
metric: Promote if any schedule gives >=2/3 mature seeds over 500 or all sentinel seeds over 380 by 5M.

probe_specs.label: i10a off1m clean seed 1
probe_specs.env: PROBE_ID=phasei10a_off1m_clean_s1 SEEDS=1 K_UPDATE=128 MPPI_NS=2048 EXPL_UNTIL=25000 TEMP_STABILITY=0.0 GLASS_WARMUP=100000 GLASS_DECAY=1000000 PROTO_TEMP=0.7 ASSIGN_SCALE=0.5 STOPGRAD=true LATENT_SMOOTH=0.0 LATENT_SMOOTH_WARMUP=0 CODE_SHA=f6ce507-dirty XLA_FLAGS=--xla_gpu_autotune_level=0 TMPDIR=/root/helios-rl/tmp
probe_specs.pass_rule: best_any >=500 by 5M or >=380 by 3M with improving diagnostics
probe_specs.kill_rule: best_any <100 at 1M with no standing/full-reward progress

evidence.summary: Created as smoke test for the idea queue. Do not enqueue automatically while current recovery queue is still draining.
